name: Kvasivska Selianska (Village Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the beef or pork stock to a low boil.
2. Add the sauerkraut juice to the boiling stock and reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the sour cream, flour, and egg until smooth.
4. Gradually add some of the boiling stock-juice to the sour cream mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Simmer for 4 minutes, then add the mashed potatoes and chopped dill.
6. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
7. Serve the soup in bowls and sprinkle the croutons on top.
